STM32 flash programming modules, initialization, FTDI+SWD flashing tool, and SWD interface implementations.

## Folders
- **[targets](targets/README.md)**: STM32 flash programming modules and classes for STM32F4 and STM32F7 microcontrollers.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initializes and manages flash programming for STM32F4 and STM32F7 boards using Serial Wire Debug.
- **[__main__.py](__main__.py.md)**: A tool for flashing a bigboard via FTDI+SWD, with options for board type and verbosity.
- **[ftdi_swd.py](ftdi_swd.py.md)**: Implements an FTDI-based Serial Wire Debug interface for communication with microcontrollers.
- **[swd_port.py](swd_port.py.md)**: Implements a Serial Wire Debug (SWD) port for reading and writing memory addresses and handling debug operations.
